title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep 53: Flux Kontext LoRA Training with Fal AI - Tips & Tricks
description:
In this episode, I’ll show you how to train a Flux Kontext LoRA using Fal AI, including step-by-step image prep, training settings, and how to make it work with both the standard Flux Kontext and the Nunchaku version in ComfyUI.

We’ll cover:
- How to create proper before/after image pairs
- Setting up trigger words and captions
- Exporting LoRAs in Comfy format
- Converting LoRAs for Nunchaku compatibility
- Using Power Lora Loader and Nunchaku Lora Loader
- Fixing common errors like UNet final layer issues
- Creating sketch-to-icon workflows with consistent alignment
- Testing different seeds and prompt tweaks for better output
- Training LoRAs for characters, fantasy items, and mandalas

Get the workflows and instructions from discord for free
Step 1: use this link to join if you didn't join already https://discord.gg/gggpkVgBf3
Step 2: access directly this episode using this link: https://discord.com/channels/1245221993746399232/1394631896960335872/1394632385689157724

Fal AI Lora
